heading: Omitted
label: 61a–4a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , authorized Comptroller of Senate to appoint and fix compensation of an auditor in lieu of a secretary. Section was omitted in view of repeal of which authorized appointment of a Comptroller of Senate by President pro tempore of the Senate and the appointment by Comptroller of Senate of a secretary, and repeal of which set out duties of Comptroller of Senate, one of which was to appoint a secretary.Pub. L. 92–342, § 10186 Stat. 433section 61a–4 of this titlesection 61a–5 of this titleJuly 10, 1972
